[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 01010100 3
3 11100000 3
4 10101100 4
5 01010010 3
6 10011011 5
7 11101101 6

01 10 01000000 1
12 21 10100000 2
23 32 00000000 a match 0 1
34 43 00010010 2
45 54 10001001 3
56 65 01000100 2
67 76 01000000 1
70 07 01010000 2

02 20 00000100 1
13 31 01000000 1
24 42 10001000 2
35 53 01000000 1
46 64 00000010 1
57 75 11001001 4
60 06 01000100 2
71 17 11000000 2

03 30 01010000 2
14 41 10000000 1
25 52 10101100 4 match 4
36 63 01000010 2
47 74 10011001 4
50 05 01000100 2
61 16 01000000 1
72 27 10001000 2

04 40 00010000 1
15 51 11100000 3 match 3
26 62 00000100 1
37 73 01010000 2
